team.date_founded: Founded by the ice-mining crews of Callisto, who hunted in packs against the cold and learned to play the same way.
team.number_of_fans: Around 20 million, a tight-knit, howling support that travels as one.
team.badge: A silver wolf's head against a pale moon, ringed by frost.
team.home_kit: Steel-grey and white with a frosted wolf-fur texture across the shoulders.
team.away_kit: Midnight blue with silver claw-marks raking down one side.
team.third_kit: Pale ice-white with a faint pawprint trail.
team.history: Callisto Wolves play as a pack or not at all. Their coordinated, snapping press is the most synchronised in the league — eleven players moving as one organism, hunting the ball in relays until the prey makes a mistake. Individual stars are distrusted here; the collective is everything.
team.club_culture: Communal, loyal, and fiercely collective. At Callisto, no one hunts alone.
team.political_leaning: Frontier collectivist — a co-operative club in a co-operative colony.
trophy_cabinet: A proud record of punching above their weight
legends: Lupa Vane — the captain who could trigger the whole pack's press with a single glance
achievements: Most coordinated team presses in the league

stadium.date_built: Built on the frozen plains where the first mining packs played.
stadium.sponsors: Backed by the Callisto ice-extraction co-operatives.
stadium.pitch_size: Compact, to keep the pack tight and the prey cornered.
stadium.pitch_type: Insulated synthetic turf that holds heat against the moon's deep cold.
stadium.bio: The Howling Den is a wall of sound — the Pack's supporters howl in unison when the press is triggered, a noise that has unnerved far grander visitors into surrendering the ball.

training_facility.date_built: A modest, functional centre built on the colony's tight budget.
training_facility.sponsors: Funded co-operatively, like everything on Callisto.
training_facility.bio: The Tundra Performance Centre is no-frills but ruthlessly effective at one thing: drilling the synchronised press until the whole squad moves on instinct, as a single hunting pack.

manager.appearance: Lean and watchful, with pale eyes that seem to track the whole pitch at once.
manager.bio: Frost Adeyemi conducts the Wolves' press like a pack leader, demanding total synchronisation and total trust. He cares nothing for individual brilliance and everything for the collective hunt.
manager.playing_history: A tireless pressing midfielder who embodied the pack ethos before he coached it.
manager.playing_philosophy: Press as one, win as one. The pack that hunts together never goes hungry.
manager.culture: A true believer in the collective over the individual.
achievements: Built the league's most synchronised pressing unit

managing_staff.appearance: Stocky and frost-bearded, runs the conditioning sessions outdoors in the cold on principle.
managing_staff.bio: Grip Svenson keeps the Pack able to press for ninety minutes in brutal cold, building the relentless engine the collective hunt depends on.
managing_staff.personality: Hardy and communal; trains alongside the players.
managing_staff.playing_history: A cold-climate endurance athlete before coaching.
managing_staff.playing_philosophy: A pack that tires is a pack that starves. Fitness is the price of the press.
achievements: Built the conditioning behind a ninety-minute press

players.appearance: Calm and broad, the steady eyes at the back of the pack.
players.bio: Frost Vega is the composed last line who sweeps behind the high press, balanced and unflustered when the hunt leaves space behind.

players.appearance: Selfless and rangy, the right edge of the press.
players.bio: Tundra Cross is the team-first full-back who triggers the press from wide, hunting the touchline as part of the pack.

players.appearance: Snarling and combative, attacks every challenge.
players.bio: Glacier Kane brings the bite to the back line, an aggressive defender who relishes the physical edge of the hunt.

players.appearance: Tireless and sturdy, the workhorse of the defence.
players.bio: Ice Brennan never stops covering, the relentless grafter who keeps the pack's shape when the hunt scatters.

players.appearance: Watchful and careful, the cautious anchor at the back.
players.bio: Blizzard Sato is the prudent defender who refuses to be drawn out of position, the cool head that keeps the press from over-committing.

players.appearance: Bright and inventive, the rare creator in a pressing machine.
players.bio: Howl Okafor is the creative pulse who turns the pack's turnovers into chances, the imagination behind the relentless hunt.

players.appearance: Willing and selfless, the heart of the midfield hunt.
players.bio: Shadow Mori is the team-first midfielder who closes every gap, the glue that keeps eleven hunters moving as one.

players.appearance: Balanced and tidy, the calm in the midfield storm.
players.bio: Pack Reyes is the composed passer who keeps the ball once the hunt wins it, balancing the chaos with control.
achievements: Highest pass completion in the side

players.appearance: Lean and predatory, the lone selfish streak in a selfless side.
players.bio: Fang Petrov is the finisher who feeds on the panic the press creates, a selfish striker the collective tolerates for his goals.

players.appearance: Fierce and direct, leads the hunt from the front.
players.bio: Claw Nakamura is the aggressive forward who sets the press in motion, snapping at defenders until they break.
achievements: Most forward pressures in the league

players.appearance: Balanced and quick, the outlet on the break.
players.bio: Hunt Rivera is the composed forward who finishes the chaos, carrying the ball into space when the pack wins it high.

players.appearance: Older and careful, the calm deputy keeper.
players.bio: Chill Vargas is the cautious veteran second keeper, dependable on the rare day the pack needs him.

players.appearance: Selfless and steady, the dependable squad defender.
players.bio: Permafrost Kim is the team-first deputy who slots into the press without disrupting it, the reliable next hunter up.

players.appearance: Young and balanced, an academy defender finding his place.
players.bio: Arctic Tran is the promising young defender learning the pack's synchronised ways, calm and quick to adapt.

players.appearance: Inventive and raw, an academy playmaker in waiting.
players.bio: Winter Chen is the creative deputy who offers a different answer when the press alone won't break a side, a youngster with rare vision.

players.appearance: Lean and hungry, an academy striker with a selfish streak.
players.bio: Stalker Beck is the prowling young finisher pushing for a place, a selfish forward the collective is still learning to trust.
